Text.Main:
[$emote]The suspicious Scav looks you over quietly.  Finally, the Scav nods to no one in particular and thrusts out a hand.  The hand drops when you decline to shake it.[$/emote]

Right...  Well greenie, you may not think you want to talk to an ol' gleaner like me, but you do.

You dropped this as you came into town, didn't you?

[$emote]The Scav holds out a spy camera for you to take, clearly one of the four you collected for Goodfellow Starbuck.[$/emote]

There, that wasn't so bad now, was it?  I swear, some day you greenskins will learn that we Scavs aren't your enemies...  I just hope you leave enough of alive to reach that day.

[$emote]Before you can say thank you, the Scav turns away, ignoring you completely.[$/emote]
What sort of item do you need?
What type of kit do you need?  Working or salvaged?
